Prisoners (2013)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $61,002,302Details
International Box Office $52,308,245
Worldwide Box Office $113,310,547
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $11,817,771
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $6,549,345
Total $18,367,116
Further financial details...

Synopsis

How far would you go to protect your family? Keller Dover is facing every parent's worst nightmare. His six-year-old daughter, Anna, is missing, together with her young friend, Joy, and as minutes turn to hours, panic sets in. The best lead is a dilapidated RV that had earlier been parked on their street. Heading the investigation, Detective Loki arrests its driver, Alex Jones, but a lack of evidence forces his release. As the police pursue multiple leads and pressure mounts, knowing his child's life is at stake, the frantic Dover decides he has no choice but to take matters into his own hands. But just how far will this desperate father go to protect his family?

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$20,817,053 (34.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.93 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:53.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$46,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,260 opening theaters/3,290 max. theaters, 5.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $89,740,162

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 20th, 2013 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: September 19th, 2013 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
September 27th, 2013 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
October 2nd, 2013 (Wide) (Belgium)
October 4th, 2013 (Wide) (Iceland)
October 11th, 2013 (Wide) (Spain)
Video Release: December 17th, 2013 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R for disturbing violent content including torture, and language throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2286, 8/21/2013)
Running Time: 153 minutes
Filming location (country): United States
Plot point: Kidnap, Missing Person, Police Procedural, Religious, Revenge, Sex Crimes, Surprise Twist, Tortured for Information, Vigilante
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Alcon Entertainment, 8:38 Productions, Madhouse Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

How far would you go to protect your family? Keller Dover is facing every parent's worst nightmare. His six-year-old daughter, Anna, is missing, together with her young friend, Joy, and as minutes turn to hours, panic sets in. The best lead is a dilapidated RV that had earlier been parked on their street. Heading the investigation, Detective Loki arrests its driver, Alex Jones, but a lack of evidence forces his release. As the police pursue multiple leads and pressure mounts, knowing his child's life is at stake, the frantic Dover decides he has no choice but to take matters into his own hands. But just how far will this desperate father go to protect his family?
